use_cases: Triggering form submissions with primary action styling
Destructive actions like delete or remove operations
Secondary navigation or less prominent actions
Icon-only buttons for compact UI spaces
Ghost-style buttons for subtle, minimal interfaces
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-based button component with Tailwind CSS styling featuring multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Supports composition via asChild prop with Slot, includes disabled and focus states with accessibility-focused outlines. Ideal for any interface requiring standard action triggers.
